translations.zh-Hans: 我们赶紧找个地方躲雨吧。
translations.yue: 我哋快啲搵個地方避雨。
translations.vi: Chúng ta vào trú mưa đi.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (3rd person singular), here functioning as the subject of the pronominal verb construction.
Reflexive clitic pronoun, agreeing with the subject and placed before the verb; marks the pronominal verb 'se mettre'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the pronominal expression 'se mettre à' meaning 'to take cover' here.
Preposition introducing the nominal complement that follows.
Noun with elided definite article 'l'' (from 'le') before a vowel; object of the preposition 'à'; masculine singular.

sentences.target: J'attends sous l'abri de l'arrêt de bus.
sentences.reading: /ʒatɑ̃ su labʁi də laʁɛ də bys/

translations.fr: J'attends sous l'abri de l'arrêt de bus.
translations.ipa: /ʒatɑ̃ su labʁi də laʁɛ də bys/
translations.en: I'm waiting under the bus shelter.
translations.es: Estoy esperando bajo la marquesina de la parada de autobús.
translations.de: Ich warte unter dem Dach der Bushaltestelle.
translations.it: Sto aspettando sotto la pensilina della fermata dell’autobus.
translations.ko: 버스 정류장의 쉼터 아래에서 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在公交站的候车亭下等着。
translations.yue: 我喺巴士站嘅候車亭下面等緊。
translations.ru: Я жду под навесом на автобусной остановке.
translations.pt: Estou esperando debaixo do abrigo do ponto de ônibus.
translations.he: אני מחכה מתחת לסככה של תחנת האוטובוס.
translations.tr: Otobüs durağındaki üstü kapalı yerde bekliyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi dưới mái che của trạm xe buýt.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر تحت مظلة موقف الحافلات.
translations.nl: Ik wacht onder de abri bij de bushalte.
translations.uk: Я чекаю під навісом на зупинці автобуса.
translations.hi: मैं बस स्टॉप के शेल्टर के नीचे इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Czekam pod wiatą na przystanku autobusowym.
translations.el: Περιμένω κάτω από το στέγαστρο της στάσης λεωφορείου.
translations.nb: Jeg venter under leskur ved bussholdeplassen.
translations.id: Aku menunggu di bawah atap halte bus.
translations.ro: Aștept sub adăpostul din stația de autobuz.
translations.cs: Čekám pod přístřeškem na autobusové zastávce.
translations.da: Jeg venter under læskuret ved busstoppestedet.
translations.ja: バス停の屋根の下で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Present indicative, 1st person singular; the subject clitic 'je' is elided to 'j'' before a vowel-initial verb.
Preposition selecting a noun phrase complement.
Noun with elided definite article 'l'' (from 'le'); object of the preposition 'sous'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement, linking 'l'abri' to 'l'arrêt'.
Noun with elided definite article; head of the genitival complement in 'de l'arrêt'.
Preposition linking 'arrêt' to 'bus' to form the compound noun phrase 'arrêt de bus'.
Invariable masculine noun; complement of 'arrêt' via 'de'.

sentences.target: Il y a un abri là-bas.

translations.fr: Il y a un abri là-bas.
translations.en: There is a shelter over there.
translations.de: Da drüben gibt es einen Unterstand.
translations.vi: Đằng kia có một chỗ trú.
translations.nb: Det er et ly der borte.
translations.ja: あそこに休憩所がある。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun used in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Clitic adverbial pronoun meaning 'there'; part of the fixed existential expression.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'avoir'; forms 'il y a' meaning 'there is/are'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun 'abri'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the determiner 'un'.
Deictic adverb indicating location at a distance.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons un abri près d'ici.

translations.fr: Nous cherchons un abri près d'ici.
translations.en: We are looking for a shelter near here.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un refugio cerca de aquí.
translations.de: Wir suchen in der Nähe nach einem Unterstand.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un riparo qui vicino.
translations.ko: 우리는 이 근처에서 쉴 곳을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在找附近的避雨处。
translations.yue: 我哋喺附近搵緊避雨地方。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um abrigo por aqui.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm chỗ trú gần đây.
translations.ar: نبحث عن مأوى قريب من هنا.
translations.nl: We zoeken een schuilplek hier in de buurt.
translations.hi: हम यहाँ के पास कोई आश्रय ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter ly i nærheten.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari tempat berteduh di dekat sini.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter skydd här i närheten.
translations.da: Vi leder efter et læskur i nærheden.
translations.ja: この近くで雨をしのげる場所を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Present indicative, 1st person plural; finite verb agreeing with 'nous'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'abri'.
Common noun functioning as the direct object of 'cherchons'.
Preposition typically used with 'de' to introduce a complement of proximity.
Contraction of 'de' + 'ici'; functions as an adverbial complement to 'près'.
